prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约3777→3522→4528→3636，整体波动较大，2024年出现明显后移（4528名），2025年回弹至3636名，近两年波动幅度约900名，2025年基准位 次约3636名；本省招生计划2022–2023年均为55人，2024–2025年降至50人；2026年计划仍为50人，较2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，竞争格局基本稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流，软科主榜未进入前200名，属军事类院校，报考有特殊要求（须应届普通高中毕业生、中共党员或共青团员），限制了部分考生报考范围。；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常数据中均无显著记录，舆情平稳，未见明显正面或负面信号影响报考心理。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类、航空航天类为主，2026年计算机类热度为推荐、电子信息/通信为高 热推荐，相关工科专业社会认可度高；本省2026年物理类考生估算约32.9万人，较2025年28.5万人增长约15.5%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3636名、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生明显增加（竞争加剧）以 及专业热度持续偏高等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将小幅后移；预测最低位次约3686名，区间3186–4186名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3186–4186名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（电子信息类、自动化类），一档专业（计算机类、拔尖班）作为冲刺，三档专业（大气科学类）作为保底；位次明 显优于区间下限（如3100名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 3777 → 3522 → 4528 → 3636, with overall large fluctuations. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (4528th), and in 2025 it rebounded to 3636th. In the past two years, the fluctuation range was about 900 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 3636th. The provincial enrollment plan was 55 students in 2022–2023, reduced to 50 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan remains at 50, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, and the competitive landscape is basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main list. It is a military institution with special application requirements (must be current ordinary high school graduates, members of the Communist Party of China or the Communist Youth League), which limits the scope of some candidates. The school has no significant records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission data; public opinion is stable, with no obvious positive or negative signals affecting application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The school's enrollment majors are mainly computer science, electronic information, automation, and aerospace. In 2026, computer science is recommended, and electronic information/communication is highly recommended. Related engineering majors have high social recognition. The estimated number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3636th, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in provincial physics category candidates (intensified competition), and the sustained high popularity of majors, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3686th, with a range of 3186–4186th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3186–4186, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Automation Category) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science Category, Top Classes) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Atmospheric Science Category) as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3100), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
